footerCtaCrmBody.message: Add website technology data to HubSpot, Salesforce, or Pipedrive so your team can prioritize accounts and personalize outreach faster.

footerCtaCrmHeading.message: See website technologies in your CRM

footerCtaListsBody.message: Go beyond one-off lookups with prospect lists your team can sort, export, and use to prioritize the right accounts.

footerCtaListsHeading.message: Turn quick research into ready-to-use lists

footerCtaNeedMoreBody.message: If the extension helps you research a website's technologies, Wappalyzer can help your team find more companies using the same tools and build lead lists at scale.

footerCtaNeedMoreHeading.message: See a site's stack. Find more like it.

footerCtaProspectsBody.message: Search by the tools companies use to build prospect lists with the company details and context your team needs to qualify faster.

footerCtaProspectsHeading.message: Find companies using the tools you target

footerCtaWorkflowBody.message: Keep records updated automatically so sales and marketing can prioritize the right accounts and send more relevant outreach.

footerCtaWorkflowHeading.message: Bring website technologies into your workflow
